svg.title: Field Notes — Zane Wang's research journal, bound
svg.desc: A multi-page field journal as one continuous SVG. Pages: hero, log, tally (stats), inventory, doctrine, letter.

text.font-family: Charter, 'Iowan Old Style', 'Source Serif Pro', Cambria, Georgia, serif

svg.text: a working notebook · agents · maps · sensors · tools
I am a researcher of fuzzy systems.
These pages are observations from the field.

g.text: A multi-agent orchestration protocol. Each agent specializes (planner /
implementer / reviewer / designer / conductor). The constellation does the work.
Persistent memory for AI agents — SQLite + FTS5 + optional embeddings.
Survives compaction, machine moves, process restarts. ~570 notes shipped.
A /dev protocol that runs a senior-engineer workflow end-to-end:
investigate, brainstorm, plan, execute (TDD), verify, ship.
NASA satellite passes + weather + a small classifier, mapped.
AI, maps, and a real-world signal in the same room.
Computer-using AI for personalized outreach — human in the approval loop.
Board-game logic. Tiny rules, deep strategy. Clean state machines.

svg.text: What is on the page so far. Cadence over count, breadth over flash.
Tool fit over logo walls. Counted by domain, not by hype.
Partial extract — the full set lives in the Agent Dao manual.

g.text: consolidate what overlaps; simplify what is tangled.
never defend a position; update it.

svg.text: — a sidekick replies in your issue (~30s).
The reply takes about thirty seconds — the time a postal courier needs to walk to the next house.

text.font-family: Charter, "Iowan Old Style", "Source Serif Pro", Cambria, Georgia, serif
Charter, "Iowan Old Style", "Source Serif Pro", Cambria, Georgia, serif

svg.text: A small creature wanders the calendar, eating each day's commit. The cells are days; the trail is the year.
